hero.sub: Free meetup for developers, designers, and founders in the Mexican Pacific. Every two months, by the sea of Colima. No ties. With waves.
hero.sticker: FREE · EVERY 2 MONTHS · MANZANILLO · BY THE SEA ·

statement.lead: We believe the best ideas are born when the developer community gets together —
statement.trail: face to face, no hierarchies, with the sea in the background. That's why, since 2019, Playas on Tech meetups gather those building tech in the Mexican Pacific every two months.

comunidad.h2: Community of developers and creators in the Mexican Pacific.
comunidad.sub: Programmers, designers, founders, students, and curious folks from Manzanillo, Colima, and the entire coast. We get together to learn, connect, and share technology — no matter your level. Wherever you come from, you belong here.

cards.title: Learn
cards.text: Talks and workshops from people building tech in the region and beyond. From practical to experimental.

cards.title: Connect
cards.text: Meet the people building the future from the coast. The best collaborations start over coffee.

cards.title: Share
cards.text: Got something to teach? The mic is yours. Propose a talk and share what you know with the community.

codeOfConduct.h2: An open, safe and inclusive tech community — for all people.
codeOfConduct.sub: We take it seriously that every person feels welcome. That's why we have a clear code of conduct — read it before you come.

eventos.h2: Tech meetups in Manzanillo — every two months.
eventos.cardBody: The next Playas on Tech meetup is our 7th anniversary: a full day of tech talks, networking, and a toast by the sea at Hotel Marbella, Manzanillo. Limited seats, ticket required.

editionsTimeline.sub: Every two months, no exceptions, by the sea. This is the path that brought us here.

venue.body: A comfortable space in Manzanillo with fast internet and even better vibes, steps from the sea. Each edition is held at a local venue; the exact location is announced with each meetup. Fast WiFi, coffee, and parking included.
venue.alt: Space where Playas on Tech meetups are held in Manzanillo, Colima — by the sea
features: Fast WiFi and plenty of outlets

organizadores.sub: Every Playas on Tech edition is put together by volunteers in their spare time, out of love for the community. Non-profit: just the desire to bring together those building tech on the coast.
organizadores.ctaBody: We're looking for hands to organize, give talks, find venues and much more. No experience required, just the will to give back to the community.

sobreNosotros.intro: Playas on Tech is an independent, non-profit tech community, organized by volunteers in Manzanillo, Colima since July 2025. We gather developers, designers, and creators from the Mexican Pacific in free meetups every two months, by the sea. Everything we do is freely accessible: events, talk recordings, and materials. We sustain ourselves through community donations and sponsorships from local businesses.

terms.title: Non-profit
terms.body: Organized by volunteers and sustained by the community. Zero profit motive: everything raised goes back to the event.

terms.title: Open content
terms.body: Talks, slides and recordings under Creative Commons (CC BY 4.0). Share and reuse them with attribution.

terms.title: Open source
terms.body: The demos and this site are free software under the MIT license. Use it, learn it, improve it.

terms.title: Code of conduct
terms.body: A safe space for everyone. Participating means respecting our code of conduct.

faq.h2: Frequently Asked Questions about Playas on Tech
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before joining the tech meetup of the Mexican Pacific.

items.a: Playas on Tech is Manzanillo's tech community in Colima, Mexico. It gathers developers, designers, founders, and tech enthusiasts in free meetups held every two months, by the sea. Since July 2025, we have held six editions with over 200 cumulative attendees.

items.q: Where is Playas on Tech held?
items.a: The meetups are held in Manzanillo, Colima, Mexico — at venues in the hotel zone, always near or by the sea. The 7th edition (July 2026) will take place at Hotel Marbella, on Playa Azul Salagua.
The next meetup is our 7th anniversary: Saturday, July 18, 2026, from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, at Hotel Marbella, Manzanillo. After that date, we will maintain our bi-monthly cadence.

items.q: How much does it cost to attend?
items.a: Attending Playas on Tech is 100% free. We do not charge for entry, registration, or materials — we support ourselves through community donations and sponsorships.

items.q: Who can attend? Do I need tech experience?
items.a: Anyone interested in technology can attend. No prior experience is required: we welcome senior developers, students, designers, founders, and the curious. If you want to learn or meet the coast's tech community, you belong here.
Registration is done on playasontech.com, in the next event section. For the 7th anniversary, registration is managed via Eventbrite with a $350 MXN recovery fee, and space is limited.

items.q: What kind of talks are given?
items.a: We cover broad tech topics: web development, GSAP animation, AI and authentication, open source, community, and coding. There are deep technical talks, lightning talks, and panels. Recordings are uploaded to our YouTube channel @PlayasOnTech.

items.q: How do I propose a talk?
items.a: Anyone can propose a talk through our public form — the link is in the 'Volunteer' section and in the footer. We review submissions in order and reply before each edition's program closes.

Playas on Tech is organized by a team of volunteers in their free time, on a non-profit basis. The current team: Danny, Franky, H, Juaneque, Kev, and Mane. We are always looking for new hands to join the team.

items.q: Are there similar tech communities in Manzanillo or Colima?
items.a: Playas on Tech is the largest active tech community on the Colima coast, with a bi-monthly cadence and free admission. If you know of another local tech initiative that would like to collaborate, write to us.

items.q: How do I support the community?
items.a: You can support us in three ways: (1) donating via PayPal or Patreon — the links are in the Donations section; (2) sponsoring an edition or the anniversary, with packages starting at $5,000 MXN; (3) joining the organizing team as a volunteer.

items.q: Are there recordings of past events?
items.a: Yes. All recent sessions are on our YouTube channel — @PlayasOnTech — under the Creative Commons license (CC BY 4.0). You can watch, share, and reuse them with attribution.

donaciones.h2: Help us keep the community alive.
donaciones.body: Playas on Tech is 100% free. Every contribution helps us keep organizing free events for the community — covering venue, coffee and gear.

contacto.sub: Want to propose a talk, sponsor the next event, or have a general question? Write to us and we'll get back as soon as possible.
contacto.successBody: Thanks for writing. We'll get back to you shortly via email.
contacto.speakerCalloutH4: 🎤 We want to hear you on stage!
contacto.speakerCalloutBody: To propose your talk and help us evaluate your proposal properly, please fill out our official speaker form:
contacto.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
contacto.errorApi: Sorry, there was a problem sending your message. Please try again later.
contacto.errorNetwork: Could not send your message due to a network problem. Check your connection and try again.

footer.blurb: Tech community of Manzanillo, Colima. Free meetups for developers, designers, and founders every two months, by the sea — since 2025.
footer.handmade: Made by the sea, by the community

hero.sub: Seven editions of community, talks and waves. This is the edition that celebrates it — a special day of talks, networking and a toast by the sea of Manzanillo.

agenda.sub: An afternoon-evening to learn, connect and celebrate our 7th Anniversary.

ponentes.sub: Experts from across Mexico gather for our 7th anniversary.

comunidadesAliadas.sub: Seventeen tech communities from across Mexico join the 7th anniversary to celebrate together by the sea.

patrocinadoresCta.h2: Bring your brand to the 7th anniversary.
patrocinadoresCta.sub: Packages from $5,000 MXN — help us make this anniversary edition a memorable night.

patrocinadores.sub: Your brand in front of the Mexican Pacific tech community. Pick a package and help us make the 7th anniversary a memorable night.
patrocinadores.singleSponsor: Only 1 sponsor with this package per edition.
patrocinadores.ticketBody: Your ticket includes the official 7th Anniversary t-shirt + full access to the event. Proceeds cover the community's operations — non-profit.
patrocinadores.ticketFineprint: Sponsor complimentary tickets are FREE of charge and DO include a t-shirt.
patrocinadores.sponsorTicketTitle: Two ways to use your complimentary tickets
patrocinadores.forTeamBody: Bring them to the event: collaborators, clients, prospects, or strategic guests.
patrocinadores.forRaffleTitle: For a raffle on your social media
patrocinadores.forRaffleBody: Turn your tickets into a social media dynamic 'presented by your brand'. Playas on Tech amplifies the giveaway from its official channels and the winner receives a ticket + t-shirt. A plus for social engagement and leads.
patrocinadores.tierTicketNote: Complimentary tickets by tier: Silver 2 · Gold 4 · Platinum 6 · Diamond 10 (max)
patrocinadores.attendeeOptInNote: Gold, Platinum, and Diamond sponsors receive a list of attendees who provide explicit consent upon registration (name, email, company, role). For marketing and/or job offer use according to the terms of the sponsorship agreement.
patrocinadores.mediaPartnerH3: Are you a media outlet or creator?
patrocinadores.mediaPartnerBody: Bring your audience into the conversation. We're looking for broadcast allies to amplify the 7th anniversary.
patrocinadores.customPrefix: Only the anniversary has this structure. For bi-monthly editions we have another track with packages starting at $500 MXN —

tiers.name: Silver
tiers.tagline: Support the community and get yourself known.
benefits: Logo on the event site (Silver section)
Mention in the next 3 bi-monthly newsletters
2 complimentary tickets (use for your team or raffle them on social media in your brand's name)

tiers.name: Gold
tiers.tagline: Featured presence at the venue and during the night.
benefits: Table or booth at the venue
Recurring logo on screen during the event
Mention in post-event email to attendees
Attendee list (Standard) — opt-ins with contact info, delivered post-event (day +3). For marketing and/or job offers.
4 complimentary tickets (use for your team or raffle them on social media)

tiers.name: Platinum
tiers.tagline: Headline sponsor — protagonist on stage and at the venue.
benefits: Logo in intro/outro of the official event video
Dedicated post on social media pre-event
Attendee list (Plus) — delivery 7 days pre-event + segmentation by role/seniority/industry. For marketing and/or job offers.

tiers.name: Diamond
benefits: Welcome speech from the stage (5 min)
Co-branded lockup on ALL event assets
Attendee list (Premium) — delivery 14 days pre-event + segmentation + 3 direct intros to specific attendees. For marketing and/or job offers.
10 complimentary tickets (package max · use for your team or raffle them on social)
Planning meeting with the organizing team
Right of first refusal — next edition

amenities: Terrace for the toast by the sea

codigoConducta.heroSub: We want every Playas on Tech meetup to be a safe and welcoming space for everyone.
codigoConducta.compromisoBody: We want every event to be a safe and welcoming space for everyone. We do not tolerate any form of harassment or discrimination based on gender, sexual orientation, disability, appearance, race, age, or religion.
esperado: Ask for consent before photographing or recording someone
inaceptable: Sexual or other comments not appropriate for the context
Publishing private information of other attendees
Any other conduct considered inappropriate in a professional setting
codigoConducta.reportarBody: If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, please report it to the organizing team via our email
codigoConducta.consecuenciasBody: The organizing team reserves the right to take any action they deem necessary, including expulsion from the event without refund.
codigoConducta.closing: Thank you for helping us maintain a safe and pleasant space for everyone.
